meta.strategy: Target a mix of high-intent commercial keywords ($37 product), informational keywords (blog + GEO), and long-tail question keywords (FAQ schema + AI search). Content should rank in traditional search AND surface in AI answer engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT search, Google SGE).
meta.primary_persona: Knowledge worker 28–45, any industry, anxious about AI disruption, looking for practical guidance not theory

primary_keywords.notes: High GEO potential — target with FAQ schema

primary_keywords.keyword: how to use AI at work
primary_keywords.notes: Primary blog keyword. Long-form content competes well.
Bridges product and content. Use in meta descriptions.
Lower competition. Good secondary blog keyword.
High volume. Create dedicated blog post: 'RISEN prompt framework for beginners'
Branded + semi-branded. Easy win. Ensure landing page is optimised.
High competition but high GEO potential. Include in FAQ schema.
Very high intent — fear-based query. Perfect FAQ schema target.
Seasonal but high volume. New blog post target.

primary_keywords.target_page: blog (future post: '15 ChatGPT prompts for professionals')
primary_keywords.notes: Very high potential for Pinterest and social traffic too.

long_tail_keywords.keyword: how to use ChatGPT for my job
how to protect your career from AI

long_tail_keywords.geo_potential: Very High — branded framework, easy to rank

long_tail_keywords.keyword: best AI guide for non-technical professionals

geo_keywords.description: Keywords specifically optimised for AI search engines (Perplexity, ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Claude). These are conversational, question-format queries where structured schema answers surface prominently.
targets: What is the best AI career guide?
How do I use AI without technical skills?
What AI skills should I learn first?
Is AI going to take my job?
What is prompt engineering and how do I learn it?
What is the RISEN prompt framework?
How long does it take to become AI fluent?
Which industries are most affected by AI?
What does an AI strategy guide cover?
What are the best AI tools for professionals in 2025?
geo_keywords.implementation: All these questions are answered in FAQ schema on index.html and blog posts. Keep answers concise (2–4 sentences), factual, and cite specifics where possible.

cluster_posts: How to AI-Proof Your Career in 2025 (blog/ai-career-survival-guide.html)
The RISEN Prompt Framework: Complete Guide (future)
Which Jobs Are Safe from AI? An Honest Assessment (future)
How to Use AI at Work Without Getting Fired (future)
5 AI Roles Hiring Right Now and What They Pay (future)
ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini: Which Should You Use at Work? (future)
Best AI Tools for Healthcare Professionals (future)
How to Use AI for Education and Teaching (future)

shopify_blog_strategy.internal_linking: Every blog post links to: product page, lead magnet, and 1–2 other blog posts
seo_checklist: Primary keyword in H1, first paragraph, and at least 2 H2s
FAQ section at bottom with schema markup
Internal link to product page with anchor text 'The AI Blueprint'
CTA to lead magnet mid-article and at end
Optimised meta title (60 chars max) and description (155 chars max)
Readable URL slug (50 chars max, keyword first)
